title: M* mac + podman v4.5.0 cannot pull public image from ghcr.io
body:
### Issue Description

Re-opening #18155 as I'm hitting this too.

Cannot pull from ghcr.io on podman v4.5.0

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman logout --all`
2. `podman logout ghcr`
3. `podman pull --log-level=debug ghcr.io/agardnerit/containerbuild:main`




### Describe the results you received

```
% podman pull --log-level=debug ghcr.io/agardnerit/containerbuild:main
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug          
DEBU[0000] Called pull.PersistentPreRunE(podman pull --log-level=debug ghcr.io/agardnerit/containerbuild:main) 
DEBU[0000] SSH Ident Key "/Users/.../.ssh/podman-machine-default" SHA256:a2...O/N......k ssh-ed25519 
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v4.5.0/libpod/_ping 
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf" 
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v4.5.0/libpod/images/pull 
Trying to pull ghcr.io/agardnerit/containerbuild:main...
Error: initializing source docker://ghcr.io/agardnerit/containerbuild:main: unable to retrieve auth token: invalid username/password: unauthorized
DEBU[0000] Shutting down engines
```

### Describe the results you expected

The image to be pulled sucessfully. No error

comments.body:
I believe this to be a GitHub issue and a side issue when moving a private repository (with a previously build image) to public.

Here's what happened and how I resolved it (for others):

1. Repo was private. I build an image
2. Set the repo to public and the pull failed
3. Created this thread
4. Deleted the existing image package and rebuilt (while repo is now public)
5. Tried to pull image - it worked

Hope this helps.
